posts.cookedHtml:
Hello, Question

Schermafbeelding 2023-01-23 om 22.24.35860×138 34.2 KB

posts.author: CharlotteK (Charlotte Kirkham)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Lex! It looks like this is an error with the app itself so I’d suggest reaching out to the app developers here: Jira Service Management
